facebook.caption:
4.5 stars. Bãi Dài beachfront. And it's Vinpearl.

Vinpearl Land Phú Quốc sits on one of the quietest stretches of coast on the island. Private resort zone, full facilities, and that Vinpearl scale that actually delivers.

If you're comparing resorts for your Phu Quoc trip, this one keeps showing up for a reason.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
